TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tbulan, title = Tbulan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tbulan} }

S.FORM: alang Tbulan ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 291 buwan, 693 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 52% kyan ku 358 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 48% kyan ku 335 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 44%, Amis 4%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. qalang Tbulan ga maki 2 pqwasan biru. qalang Tbulanga maki 2 kyokay. qalang Tbulan ga maki 2 hasisyo. qalang Tbulan ga maki 1 ngasal sexu. qalang Tbulan ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Tbulan ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tbulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tbulan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tbulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tbulan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tbulan hya' ga Hrung. tay 'zil na Tbulan hya' ga Lilang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tbulan ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 291 buwan, 693 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 52% kyan ku 358 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 48% kyan ku 335 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 44%, Amis 4%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. qalang Tbulan ga maki 2 pqwasan biru. qalang Tbulanga maki 2 kyokay. qalang Tbulan ga maki 2 hasisyo. qalang Tbulan ga maki 1 ngasal sexu. qalang Tbulan ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Tbulan ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tbulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tbulan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tbulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tbulan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tbulan hya' ga Hrung. tay 'zil na Tbulan hya' ga Lilang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tβulan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi atu waħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, ʦ~ʨou *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru kjokaj. qalaŋ tβulan ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ tβulaŋa maki * kjokaj. qalaŋ tβulan ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ tβulan ɣa maki * ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ tβulan ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ tβulan ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tβulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na tβulan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tβulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na tβulan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tβulan ħjaʔ ɣa ħruŋ. taj ʔzil na tβulan ħjaʔ ɣa lilaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
